description: Style Note This wallet from hidekraft is a must-have accessory for the style conscious male. Carry your monetary essentials in style with this classic wallet. Product Details Three-fold black walletHas two main compartments, three card slots, three insert pockets and an id card holderA buttoned pocket on the right side to carry coins Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Genuine leather Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 9.4 cm x 11.7 cm
